# Influencer Insurance — influencerinsurance.co.nz
# Last updated: 2026-05-10
# Format: llms.txt v1 (https://llmstxt.org)

> Influencer Insurance is New Zealand's specialist insurance referral service for content creators, social media influencers, and digital entrepreneurs. We connect creators with licensed NZ insurance advisers and brokers who understand the unique risks of the creator economy.

## About This Site

influencerinsurance.co.nz is a lead generation and referral service for NZ content creators seeking specialist insurance cover. We are not an insurer, underwriter, or financial adviser. All insurance advice and quotes are provided by independently licensed Financial Advice Providers (FAPs) operating under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. The site operates under a broker referral model — enquiries submitted via our quote form are passed to a licensed adviser who contacts the enquirer within one business day.

The site was built in 2026 and covers all major content creator categories active in the New Zealand market. It is structured to serve organic search queries around influencer insurance, creator insurance, content creator liability, and related NZ regulatory topics.

## Who We Serve

We serve content creators and social media influencers across all major platforms and niches operating in New Zealand:

- **Instagram Influencers** — lifestyle, fashion, food, travel, beauty and product-review creators on Instagram
- **YouTube Creators** — long-form video creators covering entertainment, education, tutorials, reviews and vlogs
- **TikTok Creators** — short-form video creators in entertainment, lifestyle, comedy, finance and education
- **Podcasters** — audio content creators, interview show hosts, and branded podcast producers
- **Travel Influencers** — location-based creators documenting travel experiences, transport, accommodation and adventure
- **Fitness & Wellness Creators** — personal trainers, yoga instructors, nutritionists and wellness coaches creating content
- **Gaming Streamers** — live streamers on Twitch, YouTube Gaming and Kick; Let's Play and esports content creators
- **Fashion & Beauty Creators** — makeup artists, stylists, beauty reviewers and clothing haul creators
- **Adult Content Creators** — OnlyFans, Fansly and subscription platform creators seeking privacy and cyber cover
- **Automotive & Motorsport Creators** — car review channels, track day creators, motorbike and performance car content
- **Food & Recipe Creators** — recipe developers, food bloggers, restaurant reviewers and cooking tutorial creators
- **Financial Influencers (Finfluencers)** — creators discussing investing, KiwiSaver, personal finance and crypto
- **Outdoor & Adventure Creators** — tramping, mountain biking, surfing, kayaking and extreme sport content creators
- **UGC Creators** — user-generated content creators producing content for brands without public-facing channels

## Insurance Coverage Types

### Public Liability Insurance
Public liability covers a creator for third-party property damage or personal injury caused during content creation activities. This is essential for creators who film at third-party locations, run events, brand activations, pop-ups, or workshops. Cover typically starts from $25/month. Key scenarios: camera tripod damages venue property during a brand shoot; a fan is injured at a creator meet-and-greet; a drone falls and damages a car during a travel vlog shoot.

URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/coverage/public-liability/

### Equipment & Gear Insurance
Equipment cover protects cameras, drones, lenses, laptops, audio gear, lighting rigs, and other production equipment against theft, accidental damage, and loss. Essential for any creator with significant kit investment. Cover typically starts from $25/month. Key scenarios: camera stolen from a hire car; drone crashes into the sea; laptop with all footage is dropped and destroyed; microphone damaged at a live recording event.

URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/coverage/equipment-gear/

### Cyber & Privacy Insurance
Cyber insurance covers losses arising from hacked accounts, unauthorised access, data breaches, ransomware attacks and cyber extortion. Critical for creators with large followings, subscription platforms, or mailing lists. Cover typically starts from $30/month. Key scenarios: Instagram account hacked and ransomed; mailing list data leaked; creator's OnlyFans account compromised; phishing attack results in PayPal account drain.

URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/coverage/cyber-privacy/

### Professional Indemnity Insurance
Professional indemnity (PI) covers creators against claims that their content, advice, or professional services caused a client or third party financial loss. Particularly important for finfluencers, health and wellness creators, and creators providing paid consultancy. Cover typically starts from $43/month. Key scenarios: brand alleges influencer's post breached the sponsorship contract terms; fitness creator's advice leads to a follower injury; sponsored product fails to perform as described in the content.

URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/coverage/professional-indemnity/

## NZ Regulatory Context for Content Creators

### Fair Trading Act 1986
The Commerce Commission enforces influencer disclosure obligations under the Fair Trading Act 1986. Creators must clearly disclose any commercial relationship (paid posts, gifted products, affiliate arrangements) to avoid misleading consumers. Fines can reach $200,000 per offence for individuals and $600,000 for companies. The Commerce Commission's influencer guidance (published 2022, updated 2024) sets out minimum disclosure standards. Professional indemnity insurance can cover legal defence costs if a disclosure complaint is made.

### Privacy Act 2020
Creators who collect subscriber email addresses, run competitions, or operate membership platforms have obligations under the Privacy Act 2020. The Act establishes 13 information privacy principles governing the collection, storage, use and disclosure of personal information. Data breaches must be reported to the Privacy Commissioner if they are likely to cause serious harm. Cyber insurance typically covers Privacy Act breach response costs, including notification and remediation.

### Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013
Financial influencers (finfluencers) who discuss specific investment products, KiwiSaver funds, or provide advice that could be construed as financial advice must take particular care. The Financial Markets Authority (FMA) has issued warnings to finfluencers who provide financial advice without a licence. The advisers we refer enquiries to are licensed Financial Advice Providers (FAPs) regulated under FMCA. Our site itself is not regulated under FMCA — we are an information and referral service only.

### CAA Drone Rules
Travel and outdoor creators who use drones in their content must comply with Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) rules. Drones over 250g require registration. Flights within controlled airspace require ATC clearance. Commercial drone operations require an operator certificate in some cases. Public liability insurance covers third-party damage caused by drone incidents.

### ICNZ / Insurance Council of NZ
The Insurance Council of New Zealand (ICNZ) sets consumer protection standards for the NZ insurance market. The advisers we work with operate under ICNZ-aligned practices.

## Site Structure and Pages

### Homepage
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/
Overview of the service, creator types covered, coverage types, trust signals, and quote form entry point.

### Quote Page
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/quote/
The primary lead-capture page. Includes a quote form (creator type, cover needed, audience size, name, email, phone), process steps, coverage tiles, and trust signals. All submissions are routed to a licensed adviser within 1 business day.

### Coverage Hub
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/coverage/
Overview of all four coverage types available to NZ content creators, with links to individual coverage pages.

### Creator Types Hub
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/creators/
Overview of all 14 creator type categories with links to individual creator type pages.

### Blog / Guides Hub
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/
20 in-depth articles covering influencer insurance, NZ regulatory obligations, equipment cover, cyber risk and creator business topics.

### FAQs Page
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/faqs/
Frequently asked questions about influencer insurance in NZ, covering who needs it, what it costs, how the referral process works, and regulatory context.

### Locations Page
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/locations/
City-specific landing page covering creator insurance in Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Queenstown, Hamilton, Tauranga, Dunedin and Nelson.

### About Page
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/about/
Information about the service, our referral model, and how we work with licensed advisers.

### Contact Page
URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/contact/
Contact details and enquiry form.

1. Complete Guide to Influencer Insurance in NZ
   URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/complete-guide-influencer-insurance-nz/
   Overview of all insurance types relevant to NZ content creators, why they matter, and how to get cover.

   URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/nz-influencer-fair-trading-act-guide/

   URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/equipment-insurance-content-creators-nz/
   What equipment is covered, how to value your kit, common claim scenarios, and how to get equipment insurance in NZ.

4. Influencer Cyber Insurance
   URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/influencer-cyber-insurance-nz/

   URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/professional-indemnity-influencers-nz/

    URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/micro-influencer-insurance-nz/
    Why micro-influencers (under 50k followers) still need insurance, affordable cover options, and common misconceptions.

16. Gifted Products and FTA Obligations
    URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/gifted-product-fta-obligations-nz/
    Commerce Commission rules on gifted product disclosure, affiliate links, and when gifted product reviews become regulated advertising.

17. Food & Recipe Creator Insurance
    URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/food-recipe-creator-insurance-nz/

    URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/adventure-outdoor-creator-insurance-nz/

    URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/ugc-creator-insurance-nz/

20. Influencer Insurance Claims — Real Examples
    URL: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/blog/influencer-insurance-claims-nz/
    Real-world claim scenarios across all coverage types, how the claims process works, and what to expect.

## Indicative Pricing

All pricing is indicative and subject to individual assessment by a licensed adviser:

- Public Liability Insurance: from $25/month (approx. $300/year)
- Equipment & Gear Insurance: from $25/month (approx. $300/year)
- Cyber & Privacy Insurance: from $30/month (approx. $360/year)
- Professional Indemnity Insurance: from $43/month (approx. $516/year)
- Full Creator Package (all four covers): indicative pricing available on request

Actual premiums depend on creator type, revenue, equipment value, coverage limits selected, and claims history.

## How the Referral Process Works

1. Creator submits enquiry via the quote form at https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/quote/
2. Enquiry details are transmitted securely to a licensed NZ insurance adviser
3. Adviser reviews the creator's requirements and identifies suitable cover options
4. Adviser contacts the creator within 1 business day with tailored options and a full disclosure statement
5. Creator chooses whether to proceed — no obligation

All advisers we work with are licensed Financial Advice Providers (FAPs) or work under a licensed FAP, regulated under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013.

## Locations Served

Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Queenstown, Hamilton, Tauranga, Dunedin, Nelson, and all other regions of New Zealand. Remote and digital-only creators are served nationwide.

## Contact Information

- Website: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz
- Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- Quote form: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz/quote/

## Disclaimer and Legal

This website provides general information only. It does not constitute financial advice, insurance advice, or legal advice. All insurance recommendations and quotes are provided by independently licensed NZ Financial Advice Providers. Indicative pricing should not be relied upon for budgeting purposes without obtaining a personalised quote. Coverage terms, conditions, exclusions and pricing vary by insurer and individual circumstances.

influencerinsurance.co.nz is not regulated under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. The advisers we refer enquiries to hold their own FAP licences and are individually responsible for the advice they provide.
